name: the Unlight Reaver
description: A long, wicked blade forged from voidglass drawn out of Vaelnith itself, its edge so lightless that it reads as a slit cut in the air rather than a thing of steel. It weighs almost nothing and is always cold, and any warmth or light brought near its edge simply thins and fails. To carry it is to carry a little of the void's hunger, and the blade seems to reach for whatever it is swung toward, as though eager to unmake it.
